author: Patrick Stox
topic_filter: AI SEO / GEO / LLM SEO / AI content strategy / AI search
notes: Patrick's activity feed is dominated by reposts. Included are his most-recent original posts plus reposts where the shared content is explicitly about AI SEO/GEO/LLM topics. Entries marked is_repost=true were reposted (but not originally authored) by Patrick.

posts.text:
The Difference Between SEO and GEO/AEO.

We've got the legendary Michael King in Raleigh to break it all down for you at the Triangle SEO Meetup. 

📅 Tues, April 14 | 6-8 PM 
📍 Pendo (downtown Raleigh)
RSVP: https://luma.com/b4k0l0mj

One for the nitty gritty SEOers:

Hallucinated URLs - a link that AI makes up and dumps your user on a 404. 

I've seen them before (almost daily) without realising it was a thing, until Patrick Stox enlightened me at the Prosperity Media Sydney SEO Conference. 

I dug a little deeper and learnt that these fake little URLs can:

💫 Signal user intent 
💫 Show you how LLMs frame the problem 
💫 Give you content ideas 
💫 If you have enough, with sufficient hits, they can be worth setting up 301s to relevant pages or creating content around them

Not hugely strategic game changers but I find this nitty gritty SEO nerdery fascinating. 

Have you come across them before - and have you implented any into your site?

I was fortunate enough to sit down with the Technical SEO's, SEO. 

We even got into something he mentioned he hasn't shared publicly before 👀

Patrick Stox (Product Advisor, Technical SEO, and Brand Ambassador at Ahrefs) joined us on The Page 2 Podcast, and we went deep on where SEO is actually heading.

And, we dig into everything that job title entails:

✔️ Programmatic SEO isn't dead. ahrefs is driving millions of visits when done right.
✔️ Rank tracking might never go back to what it was (position 20+ could be gone for good)
✔️ AI isn't just hype anymore, it's legitimately replacing parts of workflows
✔️ There's real fear in the industry about what happens to SEO jobs next

🎧 Give the episode a listen and let me know what you think: https://lnkd.in/gYwYx8y3

👉 And don't forget to subscribe for more conversations like this!

Have y'all checked out Bot Analytics in Ahrefs yet? 

We released a new tool that shows how bots crawl your website. Bot Analytics collects data server-side via Cloudflare integration, but we will add more integrations based on demand.

The future is coming. 

Sign up for the waitlist: https://lnkd.in/dthd-Ke4 (The AI Marketing Agent Powered by Ahrefs Data)
